data.title: Keep Your Ego In Check And Watch Your Company Blossom
data.description: Leaders must engage in ego management to foster connections with others, a critical aspect for success. Monitoring one's ego is crucial for company growth, as highlighted in a recent article titled "Keep Your Ego In Check And Watch Your Company Blossom" by Investor's Business Daily. This emphasizes the significance of humility and self-awareness in leadership. By tempering their egos, leaders can enhance relationships within and outside their organization, ultimately driving business success.

data.title: Applied Materials Raises Quarterly Cash Dividend by 15 Percent
data.description: In Santa Clara, California, Applied Materials, Inc. revealed a notable development on March 13, 2026. The company's Board of Directors sanctioned a significant 15% boost in the quarterly cash dividend, escalating from $0.46 to $0.53 per share. This increase is set to be disbursed on June 11, 2026, to shareholders documented as of May 21, 2026. This decision marks a streak of nine successive years witnessing dividend increments for the company.

data.title: Dragonfly Energy to Report Preliminary Fourth Quarter and Full Year 2025 Financial and Operational Results on March 16, 2026
data.description: The Nevada-based Dragonfly Energy Holdings Corp. (Nasdaq: DFLI) disclosed its plan to unveil the preliminary financial and operational data for the fourth quarter and full year ending on December 31, 2025, post-market closure on Monday, March 16, 2026. Following this release, a conference call is scheduled for March 16, 2026, at 4:30 PM Eastern Time. Dragonfly Energy is recognized for its expertise in energy storage and battery technology.

data.title: Safehold Declares First Quarter 2026 Common Stock Dividend
data.description: On March 13, 2026, Safehold Inc. (NYSE: SAFE) reported that its Board of Directors approved common stock dividends totaling $0.177 per share for Q1 of 2026. This amount equates to an annual rate of $0.708 per share. The dividends are scheduled for payment in...

data.title: Kevin Warsh could face challenges as Fed Chair with Iran conflict amid desire for rapid interest rate cuts; confirmation difficulty looms.
data.description: The nominee chosen by President Trump to head the Federal Reserve might encounter difficulties in being confirmed if he pushes for immediate interest rate reductions. The ongoing conflict in Iran adds to the challenges ahead.
